id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. '3-5-ex04', '3-5-practice13'. Used across builders.

lesson.description: Lesson code, e.g. '3-5'. Must have a matching calibration/<lesson>.json.

source.description: Human-readable source, e.g. 'Savvas Practice #13', 'Savvas Example 4', 'Lesson Quiz 3-5 #2'.

page.description: Source page in the textbook PDF, if known.

image.description: Path to screenshot relative to repo root. Null for text-only questions.

has_visual.description: True if the question contains a graph/figure essential to solving it.

prompt.description: Transcribed question text. Preserve math notation as plain text (use ^ for exponents, √ for roots, etc.).

answers.description: Multiple-choice options in order. Empty array for open-response questions.

correct.description: For MC: 1-based index into answers. For open-response: the expected answer string. Null if answer not transcribed.

dok.description: Depth of Knowledge level, calibrated to Savvas anchors for this lesson.

dok_rationale.description: One-sentence justification comparing to a calibration anchor.

topics.description: Topic tags for filtering, e.g. ['multiplicity', 'factoring', 'gcf', 'end-behavior']. Lowercase-hyphenated.

used_in.description: Lesson days this question has appeared in, e.g. ['Day_2', 'Day_7-review'].
